Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, Ella Rochelle-Lawton.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jenny Jin, Esq. appeared with petitioner Angelique Rochelle, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Ella Rochelle-Lawton, who was also present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified. The minor was placed under oath but did not testify.
Order appointing Ms. Rochelle as Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on February 1, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $10,00.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,000.00.
Costs - $2,000.00.

The net balance of $6,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 2154 MacArthur Boulevard, Oakland, CA 94602. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.

The documents to be produced are limited to: (a) DOCUMENTS related to when the construction work was scheduled to begin and when the work actually began; (b) Any emails in 2014 related to the intended rental of unit 778; (c) Any and all photographs or videos of unit 778 25th Avenue taken before construction began.
Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition of Doug Wong is GRANTED. The deposition shall be limited to 1 hour. The documents to be produced are limited to: (a) DOCUMENTS related to the "disclosures" of the names of the tenants residing in SUBJECT PREMISES during the sale of SUBJECT PREMISES to DEFENDANTS; (b) DOCUMENTS exchanged between you and PLAINTIFFS from 2008 and 2014 related to SUBJECT PREMISES; (c) DOCUMENTS exchanged between you and Ruby Wong from 2008 to 2014 concerning the PLAINTIFFS. ; (d) DOCUMENTS exchanged between you and any employee of Laurel Properties from 2008 to 2014 concerning the PLAINTIFFS; (e) DOCUMENTS depicting any portion of SUBJECT PREMISES.
Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition of William Wong is GRANTED. The deposition shall be limited to 1 hour.
